items.title: Five killed in huge fire at packed Mexico fairground
items.dek: The blaze in the south-eastern city of Villahermosa erupted during a concert reportedly attended by some 135,000 people.
items.body: The blaze in the south-eastern city of Villahermosa erupted during a concert reportedly attended by some 135,000 people.

items.title: Crowds cheer China's new snooker star on return from championship win
items.dek: Wu Yize, 22, receives a rock star's welcome after becoming second-youngest player to win a world title.
items.body: Wu Yize, 22, receives a rock star's welcome after becoming second-youngest player to win a world title.
